problem_description: We have paid in full for a wedding at Morrowlight Center in Ashford that has now been closed down by Briar County. We have not received a refund nor any communication on when that will be process or next steps. We cannot select a new venue since we have not been able to get our money back, and as the weeks tick on most venues are now full. We have called and emailed along with the other hundreds of people in this same position, Seeking guidance.

problem_description: I was served a petition for custody and parenting time and child support. The father of my child wants parenting time. He lives in another state. My daughter is 14 and does not want to be forced to be with her dad. She will be 15 in August. I know she has rights too.

problem_description:
I was assaulted. Cops were called for the assault. I went to er I’m ambulance after the police arrived and took my statement. The police falsified the statement, the report and did not include the witnesses statement. The police left out their body cam footage of the interview and left out the video footage of the assault. (Should be able to supena from the company the assault happened at) Before sending the case to the DA the police mixed up my name, address and number giving the DA no way to get ahold of me. I’ve provided proof that I still have a concussion and seeing medical professionals regarding the assault. The police falsified the report by leaving out information, falsifying my statement, and not mentioning the assault at all instead charged the attacker with harassment (a false charge) the man came out of no where and attacked me hitting me in the head repeatedly until I blacked out. The police seen this on camera.
Need aggressive lawyer

problem_description: I am a writer, but am not represented by an agent, manager, or attorney. My current project, a fantasy/adventure trilogy for young adults has already generated tremendous interest, and I need very much to ask someone many Question about intellectual property, copyright, and the creation of a specialty asset trust to manage the various brands and licensing opportunities that will spin off of the books.
audit_justification: IP/copyright is clearly supported; the trust component appears to be a separate requested service (creating an asset trust), which fits estate-planning tools, though details are limited—hence primary label is not clearly exclusive.

audit_justification: Standard immigration/legal status request.

problem_description: Hours was deleted from my pay and when I said something about it to the manager I was terminated
current_ai_primary: Labor & Employment / Wage and Hour Claims
audit_label_1: Labor & Employment / Wage and Hour Claims
audit_justification: Wage issue is clear; termination after complaint adds a distinct potential wrongful-discharge/retaliation claim, so two labels are supported and the single primary as given is incomplete.

problem_description: I am seeking a consultation for a lawyer in regards to injuries I got on the job that I feel were preventable if my supervisor had listened to me. It wasn't a sudden onset injury but developed over time, I went to my lead when it became obvious something was wrong. He blew it off saying I was just tired. After a couple months I went back to him again complaining of pain, he blew it off. Over 18 months I went to him 5 times before he told me I needed a doctor's note, I went to the doctor the next day and was immediately put on light duty. My supervisor tried saying that I didn't come to him "officially" but there's no "official" procedure. There's a giant sign in the breakroom saying "if you are injured, no matter small, tell your supervisor." Eventually I was moved to another department and after 30 days was laid off with 43 other people. I have had 2 surgeries, with another on the way. Am in constant pain, have limitations on my primary arm and more. Thank you
audit_justification: Classic state workers’ compensation claim for an on-the-job injury/occupational condition.

problem_description: My landlord is refusing to fix a sewer leak issue, along with standing water under my home that is causing mold, and rodents that were living in my vents. Now she's trying to say it's my fault and I need to pay for everything, even though they are admitting the issues and know what's going on, as they are trying to get the builders the fix the issues. They keep lying to me and now for over 2 weeks I've had terrible sewer leaks they won't fix or even entertain. They said those leaks have fixed themselves all on their own, and they can't be leaking anymore.
audit_justification: Primary landlord-tenant repair dispute is clear; explicit mold conditions also support a distinct mold-claim framing if damages/health impacts are pursued.

problem_description: I owed IRS $273,393.00 because I withdrew all of my IRA accounts due to a scam on the internet. The scammers posed as Apple tech support and Fedelity Senior Fraud analyst instructed me to close all of my accounts and deposit them to secure separate accounts where the hackers cannot reach. After they can revalidate my identity then I can move the money back . I did not receive a penny from the scammers. I heard from a representative from IRS today informing me the balance due on my Federal tax return is now $279,498.57. I desperately need a tax attorney that can help me reduce taxes owed because I do not have any income besides our social security payments.
audit_justification: This is an individual federal tax debt/dispute arising from reported income on an IRA withdrawal.

problem_description: Need to get an Estate Will created for my 80 Mother. She currently doesn't have one.
audit_justification: Straightforward estate planning (drafting a will).

audit_justification: DMV administrative licensing is the best fit given the minimal text, but the lack of detail makes support uncertain.

audit_justification: Individual considering bankruptcy filing.

problem_description: Looking for low cost help in forming a 501 non-profit to register in Oregon for a small religious organization. We have bylaws, three members for a board, and the state forms filled out, but would like someone to look over everything to make sure it's in order, and, if necessary, make edits to our documents.

problem_description: My vehicle (1998 Dodge Dakota, dark green with a white canopy and no license plate) got into a really bad accident and was towed by a guy named Sam. Had to go to the hospital due to the injuries from the accident, and I wasn't able to grab my valuables or personal property from the vehicle before it was towed. I tried to call the company later that day and spoke with Sam again- he said that the only way I was able to retrieve my property was by paying him the Tow Fee which was a total of $440.00 and by providing him with the title to the vehicle. The vehicle was totaled and I am only requesting to retrieve my property (my cell phone, tools, and other personal property). I refused to pay him $440.00 for personal property and would like assistance with this matter.
audit_justification: Dispute with towing company over release of property/fees fits vehicle towing consumer issue.

problem_description: Being sued by Midland Credit for roughly $2,500. My summons was received today and says Subject to mandatory arbitration. How might I go about that process? Thank you for your help.
audit_justification: Current label (Debt Counseling/Workouts) is less accurate because the user is already in active litigation (summons, arbitration) and needs defense/strategy for being pursued on the debt.

problem_description: I am looking for a lawyer to help me get on my sons birth certificate ,also full custody and establishing paternity with my son.
audit_justification: Current primary (Paternity) is supported, but the request for full custody is a distinct additional family-law issue, so two labels are supported.

problem_description: My mother was transported to St. Elora hospital in Redmond. She was stabilized for the reason admitted. She then fell out of the bed in the ER at 1222 am, hitting her head. She broke two vertebrae, cracked her skull and split her head open. The wound was substantial and required a blood transfusion later. She was found 10 minutes later without a pulse. They performed CPR and life flighted her to Alderstone University Hospital. She had a DNR order in place. The doctors at Alderstone University Hospital said she was likely paralyzed from the neck down and was without oxygen to the brain for the time on the floor in the ER. How can an 85 year old woman, who is confined to a wheel chair "fall" out of an ER bed and die? I need help in making the hospital pay for their incompetence and wrongful death, as well as doing CPR against her wishes (which also caused several broken ribs).
audit_justification: Wrongful death is clearly implicated, but the factual basis is medical negligence, supporting an additional malpractice label.

problem_description: I have an idea for an improvement on an existing product and would like assistance in assessing patentability. I would like to talk with an IP attorney about my idea and get guidance on the likelihood of a provisional patent being awarded.
current_ai_primary: Intellectual Property / Patent (Reg Patent Attys Only)
audit_label_1: Intellectual Property / Patent (Reg Patent Attys Only)

problem_description: Possible wrongful termination and/or discrimination

problem_description: I have a signed contract with a roofing company to replace my roof, they did not do the roof, but they took $13,000 from me, and have now closed their business. I would like to file something to get my money back, I thought this was a small claims issue, but then I saw the maximum for small claims is $10,000. So, I need an attorney to help me get my money back, I'm not sure what type, maybe a breach of contract lawyer, but again, I do not know. I look forward to speaking with someone. Thank you!

problem_description: I was approved for unemployment benefits, per letter dated 6/21/24, which became final effective 7/11/24. Conditional approval, provided I did not request a hearing - which I did NOT. However, I have not received ANY money. At $812 per week, that is~$6K in unpaid benefits. I need help.
audit_justification: Clear unemployment benefits administration/payment problem; single label sufficient.

problem_description: I am curious if a lawyer can offer some guidance on dissolving an LLC partnership business and filing bankruptcy. Essentially, my former business partner and I signed an agreement over the summer that I was to leave the partnership, transfer full ownership and responsibilities to her, and be paid out over 5 years for the $10,000 loan that I provided. She was planning to remain operating but then decided to close the business about 3 months later after realizing it was too much for her to take on. My name was never officially removed from the business in that time, so now we want to go about doing so, and dissolving the business properly, along with likely filing bankruptcy. The business has about $10k in debt from other loans (SBA and Shopify), not including the $10k from myself. All assets have been sold. At this point I understand that I will very likely not be receiving my portion of the money loaned, but I do need to ensure the dissolution goes smoothly from here on out.
audit_justification: Bankruptcy for the business is clearly stated; there is also a distinct corporate need about partnership exit/ownership transfer and dissolution (even though not a typical "sale"), supporting a second label for business-transaction/partner separation.

problem_description: Looking for an attorney that specializes in business contract law and if possible has experience in farm contracts. The issue at hand stems from a verbal extension of a written lease that the other party has decided they no longer want to honor the lease extension.
audit_justification: Although user mentions wanting someone with business contract experience, the underlying legal matter is a farm land lease dispute, which fits Real Property Agriculture/Farm.

problem_description: We bought our Hyundai Ioniq 5 2023 from Marrowick Hillstone late last August and this year the twelve volt battery has completely died, and the car has lost all electrical power and function.We've had to had it towed to the dealership. It is currently at the dealership for the third time, where it has been for more than a week. The car has spent, in total, almost 30 days in the service department while we have had a loaner. The dealership has replaced the battery at least once. As far as we know the service department cannot diagnose the Question and has only been able to repeat it once. We have never been given a reason for the repeated loss of power, even when the battery is fully charged. The dealership has not contacted us in almost a week and we have not been given an update on the status of the car. We are fed up, the car is unfixable and we would like to explore legal options under Oregon's Lemon Law, as it applies, even though we live in Fairhaven.
audit_justification: Vehicle purchase defect and lemon-law style claim squarely fits consumer auto dispute.

audit_justification: Minor accused of unlawful conduct; juvenile offender label fits.

audit_justification: This is enforcement/collection of an existing judgment; current label fits exactly.

problem_description: I am looking for help with my 8 month old son. I have a DV case with my wife we are still married but we separated. she cant have custody of him due to her untreated mental condition. I am not on the birth certificate.

problem_description: Radiologist diagnostic report of my routine CTA Chest findings failed to document and report the visual endobronchial lesion/mass in my right middle lobe bronchus with post-obstructive opacities. This mass was a peanut lodged into the open of the right middle lobe bronchus requiring surgical removal. Due to this radiologists negligence that necessary procedure was inappropriately delayed. It was not until a year later, when a Brochoscopist located the obstruction. He then appropriately cleared the pneumonia and infection.He then immediately scheduled a Bronschoscopy to remove this obstruction. The resultant status of this surgical delay was a completely non-functioning and destroyed right middle lung with severe and continued persistent right middle lobe actelectasis/consolidation. This Radiologist's negligence and over site of a routine Chest CTA Scan resulted in my permanent physical debilitation,significant life altering limitations, emotional stress and mental exhaustion.
audit_justification: Text clearly alleges provider negligence and resulting injury; malpractice-medical is the best fit.

problem_description: I need to speak to someone about a potential Workman's Comp claim. I have tendonitis in my right hand due to small-scale manufacturing. Technically, I'm guessing C is the party the claim would attach to, but I am unsure of how to proceed and I do not want to fill out surgical paperwork until I have a better understanding of how to proceed. I am in significant pain and this is starting to limit my ability to participate in certain aspects of my job
audit_justification: This is a classic state workers’ comp claim for a workplace injury/occupational condition; employer sale/transition is incidental to claim handling.

problem_description: 1) Real Estate we recently purchased a home and we're lied to about what was included. 2) We need help figuring out our water rights on the property we purchase we were told 2 people have a easement to a water pipe going through the property however we were never shown an easement and we have k lines attached to this pipe.

problem_description: I'm looking for an attorney who specializes in Oregon cannabis regulatory compliance, particularly someone with experience in OLCC enforcement matters. problem_description: We are looking for someone to help with a banking issue we are having with Wells Fargo. I don't think it should be a contentious issue, but my mother needs someone that can legally represent her in the U.S. to chase down some missing funds.  Wells Fargo summarily closed her two (Portland) accounts last year and was supposed to send her cashier checks for the balance. She did receive one of the checks, but we don't know what - if anything - is going on with the larger balance of $30'000+. For practical reasons I don't want to engage directly with Wells Fargo on her behalf and it is too difficult for her to do from Switzerland.

problem_description: Major car accident - DUII
audit_justification: The only stated legal issue is DUII connected to an accident; no separate DMV hearing/notice is mentioned.

problem_description: I am being garnished from Oregon Department of Unemployment for an overpayment of over $20,000 with a 1% interest added on each month. I had requested their hardship application and submitted the documents via email within the timeframe I was given. I was later called and told that I would be garnished under the pretense that when I submitted the documents, I did not follow the instructions for I needed to submit the documents And Call. She said that there was a note on her end that said I was to call by the women I spoke to who sent me the hardship application. I don’t remember the conversation that well but I don’t remember her saying I need to call. On the email she sent me, nothing says to call, I have read it over numerous times. If this was such an important step that determines garnishment or not, why wasn’t it stressed to the fullest? And only apparently verbally said. I felt like there was nothing I could do over the phone discussing this with the person I talked to. I don’t know how to navigate any of this. She even told me the amount that I would be paying each month and what they considered in their final decision and what was not considered in their final decision. Even telling me about the waiver for forgiveness of the overpayment that I submitted and how it was unlikely that it was going to get granted due to the category that it was put into. But all of that didn’t matter because I didn’t call. I’m 25 years old with other bills and living expenses, I’m not the best with finances and already have a lot of debt that I struggle to pay and I’m being asked to pay back money that I don’t have anymore that was given to me over the course of about 11 months during this pandemic with interest. I would like to request a lawyer who can help me with getting out of the garnishment.
audit_justification: This is a dispute with the state unemployment agency about overpayment recovery and garnishment.

problem_description: I need legal advice and I need to establish paternity with my 8 month old baby boy he was born into the marrige my wife and i got married 3 months before he was born but she never put me on the birth certificate she left home but came back after 3 months noah was brought back home thankfully. I have custody of him now due to her untreated mental condition she was diagnosed with diffrent physiciatric disorders. Also I need help filling out full custody forms and getting on the birth certificate. I did file for a restraining order on her again due to her being violent with me ad my son Noah .

processing, gamification, and degree tracking. 3. Advise on filing a utility patent if my method is unique. Thank you

problem_description: I need a referral for an employment attorney. I am facing what appears to be discrimination in hiring and pay by my current employer. I am a dues-paying union member, but the union steward is almost completely unresponsive to my communications. I managed to initiate a formal complaint with the company I work for, with the union filing the paperwork at the last minute, but the steward has already said that I won't get what I believe I am entitled to. I seek legal advice now before the union process runs its course and I am pushed out of a job that I have worked very hard to acquire and succeed in.
audit_justification: While discrimination is alleged, the user also presents a distinct problem with union representation (steward unresponsive/failure to pursue grievance), supporting a second label; primary should shift to Union Issues due to the prominent union-related conflict.

problem_description: I’m a landlord in Portland trying to convict a tenant. My tenant hasn’t paid rent for 3 months.

problem_description: I need to find someone to help with a guardianship/conservatorship/elder law. He needs help but I need to find someone to work with to complete this process in the right and orderly way.

problem_description: Small claims Question: I've contracted with a small General Contractor for a home renovation. The work has generally been good and is 98% complete. problem_description: Neighbor's dog bit me on my left for arm in November 2023. It's left me unable to work for 2 months and another 7 months at roughly half time. I still have nerve damage on my left hand palm and two fingers on my left had with burning, tingling and weakness.

problem_description: Recently have been on medical leave from work and I have been trying to return to work part time, and eventually full time. I have had Questions getting timely, informative responses from my employer and the insurance company handling the leave and disability claim upon requesting return to work. Thus far I have not been approved to return to work. Have Question both on my rights regarding returning to work and on a short-term disability claim, which was initially approved and now denied.

problem_description: I live in a Manufactured Home Park for ages 65 and over. There are issues with a creek and embankment erosion behind where 28 homes are located (including mine). Company owning the park has purchased more than 20 of the homes and indicated buyouts of Fair Market Value. The work on the creek side will requires homes to be removed/demolished. Work will be done in three Phases. Mine is newer home and in Phase 2. I wanted them to purchase it now so I could purchase a new home that the company owns and is located on the other side of community. They purchased a home in Phase 3 in April  so owner could move. After 2+ months of corresponding with them on an offer, they told me they wouldn't purchase mine as "It's not needed yet". Home cannot be sold to outside buyer because of the creek erosion issues already being permitted through Hamilton County to begin next year. What is my recourse? On that day she asked if she should live at home anymore. I said no, not anymore. My siblings and I found an apartment in an independent living community, and chose an apartment. We took her to the apartment to see it and she discussed what furnishings and decorating ect. She was hesitant but feeling good my the end of the meal we had there. I have been informed that our POA's were replaced with a "friend of my mothers" and that my siblings and I are accused of elder abuse and stealing from her. I have no idea what to do?

problem_description: I have a case with the Oregon Board of Licensed Professional Counselors and Therapists in which I have been found guilty. Theee tree are several problems with which the Board handled the case. For example, one allegation was made , as written in the initial “request acknowledgment “ where the claim states that I referred the client to my uncle for an assessment. When I showed that this was not possible, since my uncle died two years prior, the investigator said in a recorded phone call that she did not need my response or to discuss it because it “was just a misunderstanding.” When I received the legal documents outlining the allegations and sanctions, the allegation had changed to I made her feel uncomfortable and confused by going on and on about my uncle. It is clear that once I could prove the allegation was untrue, the client’s story changed. The Board should have noted from there that she is an unreliable reporter. However, there were several other allegations that the Board took as true. The type that I cannot provide proof I did not do or say. But again, the way the investigator presented the allegations, I could not answer because I could not recall such generalities. When given the legal documents with details, I can say that I did not, and would not have done such things. I want to request a hearing and need advice as to whether I should have an attorney represent me, and if there is any point to pursuing a hearing based on the case information.
audit_justification: This is a direct challenge to a state professional licensing board’s allegations/sanctions and hearing process.

problem_description: We are in need of a securities lawyer to help with recovering taxes from a churning situation involving our parent's financial advisor/fiduciary.
audit_justification: This reads like an investor/family claim for misconduct by an advisor (potential fraud/breach of fiduciary duty), which is litigation rather than Business & Corporate/Securities (raising money/issuer-side).

problem_description: Securities, employee stock options, forward purchase agreements, prepaid variable forward contract I have employee stock options that I exercised. There are a couple companies that offer to do a forward purchase agreement and/or prepaid variable forward contract to help fund the stock option exercise. I would like for someone to please review the contracts to let me know if it seems sound and if there are any concerns or red flags. I would also like for someone to please review my stock option agreement to make sure I'm allowed to do so.
audit_justification: This is squarely securities/financial-instrument contract review.

problem_description: We are a partner in a small business in Islip Or. We have been seeing some issues with in our business partner that we don't agree with. He wants a larger salary than the other partner and we aren't wanting to increase his salary if all partners aren't included in this increase. We do have a business lawyer locally however, I understand that we need to obtain a lawyer of our own that specializes in business formation law and possible litigation. Can you please help me with this?
audit_justification: The problem is an intra-owner/partner dispute. The closest fit in the provided taxonomy is Sale of Business because it covers partner departures/buyouts and ownership disputes, whereas “Litigation” is premature and generic here.

problem_description: Looking for an attorney/lawyer that specializes in small business restaurant and hospitality. Also have a need for investment property/realestate law services. general consulting and litigation services.
audit_justification: Restaurant/hospitality counsel supports the current category, but the real-estate request is also explicit; the property type is not specified (investment could be residential or commercial), making the second label lower confidence.

problem_description: I need legal assistance with regards to a farm. Someone who understands agriculture transactions, leases, trusts, etc. I need representation for both the transaction and tax advice. Thanks!
audit_justification: Primary is supported due to farm transactions/leases. A second distinct service is requested: tax advice (though details are limited).

problem_description: I need a sports (and entertainment) lawyer to help advise on the set up of an ownership group for an athletic team. Thank you
audit_justification: This is business organization/ownership structuring, not IP entertainment protection; no copyright/trademark issue is mentioned.

problem_description:
I am trying to manage ownership of a dog.
A previous partner and I have been sharing time with and expenses for a dog, for 3 years. This arrangement has been very challenging and multiple agreements broken. My Ex is not returning my dog to me, refusing my access to the dog and not communicating with me.
audit_justification: The core issue is a pet ownership/possession dispute between former partners; Animal Law directly covers pet custody/property disputes. No separate family-law divorce/custody issue is described.

problem_description: We have paid in full for a wedding at Morrowlight Center in Ashford that has now been closed down by Briar County. We have not received a refund nor any communication on when that will be process or next steps. We cannot select a new venue since we have not been able to get our money back, and as the weeks tick on most venues are now full. We have called and emailed along with the other hundreds of people in this same position, Seeking guidance.
audit_justification: This is a consumer refund dispute for services not delivered; no distinct second legal issue beyond recovering payment.

problem_description: My vehicle (1998 Dodge Dart, dark green with a white canopy and no license plate) got into a really bad accident and was towed by a guy named Sam. Had to go to the hospital due to the injuries from the accident, and I wasn't able to grab my valuables or personal property from the vehicle before it was towed. I tried to call the company later that day and spoke with Sam again- he said that the only way I was able to retrieve my property was by paying him the Tow Fee which was a total of $440.00 and by providing him with the title to the vehicle. The vehicle was totaled and I am only requesting to retrieve my property (my cell phone, tools, and other personal property). I refused to pay him $440.00 for personal property and would like assistance with this matter.
audit_justification: The complaint centers on towing/impound practices and retrieval of property from the vehicle, which fits Vehicle Towing.

problem_description: I have a timeshare that I cannot use anymore. I paid a company a lot of money last year, but they did nothing. I would like to talk to a lawyer about how to get out of the timeshare without paying anyone, or getting into financial trouble
audit_justification: Primary label fits. The text supports two related consumer-service disputes (timeshare exit and paid company that did nothing), but both fall under the same Consumer Law/General subcategory; no distinct second taxonomy option applies.

problem_description: We bought our Hyundai Ioniq 5 2023 from Marrowick Hillstone  late last August and this year the twelve volt battery has completely died, and the car has lost all electrical power and function.We've had to had it towed to the dealership. It is currently at the dealership for the third time, where it has been for more than a week. The car has spent, in total, almost 30 days in the service department while we have had a loaner. The dealership has replaced the battery at least once. As far as we know the service department cannot diagnose the problem and has only been able to repeat it once. We have never been given a reason for the repeated loss of power, even when the battery is fully charged. The dealership has not contacted us in almost a week and we have not been given an update on the status of the car. We are fed up, the car is unfixable and we would like to explore legal options under Oregon's Lemon Law, as it applies, even though we live in Fairhaven.
audit_justification: This is a classic lemon-law/defective vehicle purchase dispute with the dealership/manufacturer.

problem_description: A wedding planner used photos & video of our event to promote her business. My husband and I did not sign or consent to the photo release form included in our service contract. We do not want this business sharing any images from our private wedding. I would like help in sending a "cease and desist" letter.
audit_justification: The requested relief is to stop publication/usage of private event media without consent, which aligns with privacy torts rather than a consumer product/service defect claim.

problem_description: Been a sprint/tmobile customer for many years. Yesterday I was about to buy 2 phones. It was a process. When we were finished got home with 2 new phones. My fiance couldn't use the new phone as she could hardly see the screen. So we called tmobile customer service and the gentleman said they were going to refund the restocking fee. It was my account so we (2 of us) was on the phone with the gentleman & heard what he said. He stated he will put a note our files and we could just go to the nearest store and return the phone & get another phone. When we got to the store, the lady read the gentleman's notes and he stated that he told us we couldn't get the restocking fee waived, & that we understood. That was a lie.....I am now angry & they won't give us back the money for any transaction. I am very upset that TMOBILE is doing this to their customers and it needs to stop. I just want my $ back.
audit_justification: Consumer vs business dispute about promised refund/return terms fits Consumer Law/General.

problem_description: Lost a trial for a driving motor vehicle while using mobile device, I did not use it, office saw something black in my hands and he assumed its a cell phone, even though I show him my wallet which was next to me. Want to file an appeal. Thank you.
audit_justification: This is a non-criminal traffic violation dispute with an intent to appeal; Traffic Offenses is the correct fit.

problem_description: I purchased a Evoque Range Rover from Northwind Motor Cars on 6/9/24. My car was then taken to Peregrine Roving, there it sat for over a month with no connection to fixing it after the dealer dropped it off, once the warranty was connected to they paid for a part to fix the turbo, come to find out about a week and half later, it was the wrong part and now it has been taken to a new mechanic closer to my home. I am disabled and have a 19 mo. old and when it was at Peregrine Roving, i had no idea where my car was for about two weeks and there was no word as to it being fixed. I have tried to contact a auto fraud attorney and the attorney general. I feel i was sold an ineffective warranty that has caused nothing but trouble. In addition, to this the stated cost of the warranty on the contract is $100 but I was not explained t

problem_description: I would like some help understanding a contract that I signed that feels abusive. I would like help understanding defamation law and also consumer laws, because I feel like I was defrauded by an abusive cult leader/business coach/spiritual 'teacher'. I am not sure where to begin. I would like to get my money back, and need help writing a letter to her for the refund. Thank you!

A distinct additional issue is raised by the explicit request for defamation-law help, warranting a second label. Current primary (Consumer Law/General) alone is incomplete given the separate defamation request.

problem_description: Auto shop negligence on a transmission repair causing danger to me and my children and damaging my vehicle. Looking to open a lawsuit.
audit_justification: The text frames the matter as negligence and a lawsuit (tort) rather than a standard consumer warranty/service complaint; the existing Consumer Law/General label is less fitting than a tort/property-damage style claim based on negligent repair.

problem_description: I believe I was sold a lemon. I purchased a 2017 Chevrolet Silverado n on June 18, 2022 and I have had 2 brand new motor put in since. The second motor was put in, in March of 2024. On July 11, 2024, the truck died and the system failed. Once again, this “brand new motor” has failed. I don’t know what to do from this point forward which is why I am seeking legal help through the Oregon State Bar. Please feel free to contact me anytime.

problem_description: Purchased a motorcycle which we believe is a lemon, and would like to know the steps and how we would legally pursue it with the lemon law.
audit_justification: Motorcycle lemon-law pursuit is within the vehicle purchase consumer subcategory.

problem_description: I had a pro master cargo van built into a camper van. I bought the van outright from a dealership in NH and had a VT-based builder to build it, Vernon's Vans in Dumbo. I paid in full in advance. The builder claimed to have finished the van back in February and I paid to fly out and retrieve the van. The van turned out to have massive failures and functional flaws discovered within the first couple days. Poor workmanship, functional issues and system issues. We agreed that I’d drop the van back and fly home. 60 days later she again claimed it was done passing all quality checks with ‘flying colors’ and told me to come back. I fly back and pick it up and start driving home to Oregon. Within 1 day— massive leaks, failures in the shower system leaked everywhere inside&outside. I again have to drop the van for repair and now have 0 confidence in the product and the builder has failed. She has been trying to sell w/o success for nearly 90 days and I’m out $125K and no van
audit_justification: Although it involves a vehicle, the crux is a contractor/build dispute over workmanship and failure to deliver a functioning build, not a dealership misrepresentation or standard vehicle sale issue. Real Property/Construction-Contractors is the closest fit in this taxonomy for contractor workmanship disputes.

problem_description: I have a contract that a car dealer.. Bought a new car (2019 Ford Edge ST) from Marlowe Ford Apr 2020. Car cost me $805 per month. 1 1/2 years payment caused financil problems. Went to same dealer,asked what can they.do. loan was 7.99%. Marlowe said buy the same car (2019 Ford Edge ST). They could trade same car (had 2x the mileage, later i found it had bad tires). Over 4 hours at dealer finally completed the deal. Contract was predatory. Gave me $36,000 for my car I owned that much.. They set precedent in Jan 2022 2019 Ford Edge ST ws worth $36,000. Then turned around and sold me a 2019 Ford Edge ST for $46,000 plus $4,000 of fees (Total was $49,000+). Now I am unable to pay the $660 per month. It has also trashed my credit. I can't sell car as owe $37K ans car worth $24K.
audit_justification: The issue is framed less as a defective car and more as a predatory/potentially deceptive financing deal; Consumer Law/Automobiles is not as directly supported as a consumer lending/fee/financing dispute.

problem_description: I sold my RV and did a written contract stating that this person would buy it and pay $1000 a month. They made one payment and took off with my RV. It has been a year and a half and I’ve been trying to figure this out I know they’re back in Oregon so I’m trying to solve this issue as quickly as possible. They owe me $14,000 or my RV back. I have tried to contact him in the past and they refused to have any contact or to resolve this issue. I would really like to talk to an attorney and start the process for civil court case. I need a consultation with an attorney and I need an attorney to help me. Write up paperwork and help me walk me through this process. If you guys could get back to me at the earliest that would be much appreciated. Looking forward to hearing from you.
audit_justification: This is fundamentally a creditor collection/recovery matter (seller trying to recover unpaid balance or property) rather than a consumer-vs-business dispute; thus the current Consumer Law label should change.

problem_description: Solar company installed footings for solar panels and damaged my roof. I have contacted CCB and through mediation no agreement was reached. The cost to replace my roof is between 25 to 30K. Northwind Solar is the company that I signed contracts with. The whole process once contracts were signed over 2 years ago has been awful. They finally agreed to re-wire the system in February of 2024 due to using the wrong wiring.
audit_justification: Property owner vs contractor workmanship/damage dispute fits Construction/Contractors.

problem_description: On 04/17/2024 we purchased a used 2019 Tiffin Wayfarer RV with 9K miles form Vernon's RV in Happy Hallow, OR. Purchased with understanding this RV was in excellent condition with no issues and we also purchased a 4 year warranty. Drove 600 miles to home and identified multiple issues resulting in repair estimate costs of over $10k. Since purchase, this motorhome has been unusable for over 5 months while parked at repair facilities waiting for repairs. While waiting on repairs we received 3 recall notices from Tiffin advising to not operate the motorhome until these recalls corrected. Current repair facility ordered recall parts and still waiting for repairs. Recalls are searchable on Google and were issued 1-3 years before we purchased from Vernon's. Vernon's stated they searched for recalls and found none before selling to us. Vernon's failed identify recalls that should have been corrected before offering this motorhome for sale. They sold us an safe vehicle.
audit_justification: This is a consumer vehicle/RV purchase dispute involving misrepresentation/condition and warranty/recall issues.

problem_description: On May 31st my parents agreed on paying $1,600 to have their car repaired, but the mechanic (independent) took the money and never did the job. He is not answering calls ever since.
audit_justification: Consumer paid for a service that was not provided; Consumer Law/General fits best from the taxonomy.

problem_description: I bought a certified preowned 2019 Volkswagen Tiguan on 12/20/2022, I had issues starting 12/27. The car was running out of oil so I took it to the dealership and had them add more this happened twice, then I went to get an oil change, it ran out shortly after so I had them refill, it went into limp mode after running out of oil stranding me in a parking lot. It required me to pay out of pocket $800 for a rental car for them to say nothing is wrong with the car, it went into limp mode once more after that point and again no issue was found. I have all service records and text exchanges with the dealership. It caused me to go into debt trying to keep up with the maintenance of a car that shouldn’t have needed thousands of dollars in service within the first week of ownership. I no longer have a car because I had to voluntarily give up my car due to being unable to afford my car payments due to the amount of debt I had accumulated trying to fix it.My interest rate was 2.6% I’m devastated.
audit_justification: Defective vehicle purchase and dealer service/warranty dispute aligns with the automobiles consumer subcategory.

problem_description: We are looking for someone to help with a banking issue we are having with Wells Fargo. I don't think it should be a contentious issue, but my mother needs someone that can legally represent her in the U.S. to chase down some missing funds. Wells Fargo summarily closed her two (Portland) accounts last year and was supposed to send her cashier checks for the balance. She did receive one of the checks, but we don't know what - if anything - is going on with the larger balance of $30'000+. For practical reasons I don't want to engage directly with Wells Fargo on her behalf and it is too difficult for her to do from Switzerland.
audit_justification: Issue is a consumer dispute with a bank about account closure and missing account balance; no separate debt-collection or litigation posture described.

problem_description: consumer law issue. Missing auto title from dealership in the area and i cannot sell the car. Title went missing Oct 2023 according to dealership. I have tried calling the title office and never get a call back. I have possession of the vehicle, and the lien holder does not have the title only a copy of the title.
audit_justification: This is a dealership-related vehicle transaction problem (missing title), fitting the auto consumer category.

problem_description: I got sold a car 2 years ago and it has been worked on in the shop multiple times with nothing being fixed. They claimed they fixed a few parts but when diving in deeper having to redue the brakes on my car they never fixed what needed to be done when I’ve paid so much money in my car loan and missed work because of this car. They should have never sold this car to me due to the issues it had and putting my life and my sons life at risk.
audit_justification: Complaint centers on a defective vehicle sold to the consumer and repair/warranty representations, which is squarely an auto consumer dispute.

problem_description: Small claims questions: I've contracted with a small General Contractor for a home renovation. The work has generally been good and is 98% complete. However a $5K carpet install performed by a subcontractor did not go well (poor job, visible seams, confirmed botched by other carpet co.) and needs to be replaced. The contactor and I are at odds about who should be responsible, and I'm unsure if I can withhold payment, risk a lien or who I should file a claim against if need be.
audit_justification: Primary issue is a contractor workmanship/payment dispute tied to home renovation; user also explicitly seeks small-claims procedural guidance.

problem_description: I purchased a car on driveway.com an online car buying website. The pictures of the car showed no damage/nothing wrong with it. I confirmed with a my representative via text who checked in with the dealer selling the car and they said “Meredith confirmed there are no damages: "Correct has only been on the lot for less than 15 days". fast forward I received the car and there is a lot of visible damage. All the rotors/ wheels have rust the windshield has several cracks, chipped paint dings and dents. The check engine light was on for tire pressure. The stereo touchscreen has a big black circle in it. they offer a seven day moneyback guarantee. I received the car on Monday. I sent it back on Wednesday. part of this purchase, I had to pay a $1170shipping fee that I am requesting back and they are refusing to refund me stating that that is a nonrefundable fee. I’m wondering if I have a small claims court case as they did not disclose the damages and misrepresented what I was purchasing.
audit_justification: Facts support an auto-sale misrepresentation dispute; user also explicitly requests small-claims direction.

problem_description: I purchased a vehicle from Paragon Motors, in December 2023. I had some Transmission issues right away. I took it back to the dealer they claim to have made the necessary repairs. I picked it up from them and it began immediately haveing the same issues. of this I did not take the truck back in for a while as I was using it for work. I purchased an extended service warranty with the vehicle purchase. When I was finally able to get the truck back in to them they told me that it would need a new transmission so with the warranty that I purchased it should have covered the cost however when they attempted to get authorization to complete the repairs the Warranty company refused to pay due to the previous modifications that were done on the vehicle. And I was told that the warranty was never valid on this vehicle. I cancelled the service contract and according to the warranty company it was refunded as of the purchase date and the dealer has yet to refund to me or my credit union.
audit_justification: Central conflict is with the dealer over vehicle defects and warranty/service-contract refund tied to the vehicle purchase.

problem_description: We purchased a new Toyota vehicle (financed) and the dealership sent us the title by mistake. We've been making our monthly payments and are in good standing. We've received a voicemail from the dealership asking that we give the title back to them so they can give it to our bank. Before we agree to help fix their mistake, is there any course of action that we can take to be financially compensated for their error?
audit_justification: This is a dealership/financing/title handling issue arising from a vehicle purchase.

Then it turns out she was actually a minor, this is killing me and I need representation to prove the truth please

problem_description: So my issue is I got charged with the lowest one of theft, but what happened was so I pretty much had everything in my cart paid for and I had receipts for it and everything but like I take medication for my heart, you know and like I really felt like I was like having a heart attack or something so like I like my mind just went completely blank and everything and I walk out the store with just a few items. problem_description: I was falsely accused on allegations that are not true. I have the proof via text and witnesses I’m being charged with 4 counts of misdemeanor charges for harassment and menacing. I have all the receipts that indicate I am not guilty

problem_description: Measure 11 assault charges, driving under the influence, fleeing the police, and giving false information.

problem_description: I have been charged with four misdemeanors after protecting my nephew from a verbal and physical altercation with someone he used to work with. I simply yelled at both young men to nock it off and go the fuck home and the other man turned and came at me and started yelling and threatening me and he got 3 inches from my face and when yelling he was spitting on me so I shoved him away from me, and I told him go fucking home, leave us alone. He did then four days later cops showed up at my front door at 9 p.m and took me into custody, processed and held me until 1 a.m. Now I am being charged with assault, strangulation and two other charges. I at the time had two tore rotator cuffs and neouropathy in my hands. I cannot even hold a coffee cup yet alone try to strangle someone. I did yell and I did shove him, but thats it. I am being charged and seriously need help. I am 63-year-old, and I am low-income.

problem_description: I am looking for a lawyer for my dad in Byfield. He just got his second DUI. We are looking for a (Spanish) bilingual lawyer who could guide us on what our next steps are. He doesn’t have any identifications and his prior DUI was over 10-15 years ago.

problem_description: I was unconstitutionally convicted of Sex Abuse I in 2012. I had a successful PCR and am now being re-charged.
audit_justification: The core issue is post-conviction relief/appeals (PCR) and litigation following reversal, not simply 'Major Felony' as a generic charge-severity label.

problem_description: I got a speeding ticket just outside of Madison (Cooper County), I really cannot take a hit to my car insurance prices. I would like advice and/or representation for this matter.
audit_justification: Standard moving violation defense.

problem_description: I haven't been financially able to pay my credit card debt to Bank of America and received a summons on June 15th.
audit_justification: This is a debtor being sued on a consumer debt.

problem_description: Being sued by Midland Credit for roughly $2,500. Attempted to settle but Vernon, Pike, & Tolland, PC are saying they can’t offer any settlements lower than 90% of the amount owed. What steps can I take to reach fair settlement? My summons was received today and says Subject to mandatory arbitration. How might I go about that process? Thank you for your help.

problem_description: I received a summons to appear in circuit court for a debt that I owe to Bank of Oregon. I do want to pay it, I just don't have the resources yet. I am working and have been paying off other debts because I have been sick for over 2 years and am not always able to work. I need to know what I have to do now to remedy this situation and still keep my job. Thank you.
audit_justification: Current label focuses on negotiating payment terms, but the text centers on being sued/summons and consequences, which fits General (Debtor) best.

problem_description: I am being brought to court for failure to pay a debt to Oregon Savings Bank. I have been going through several hardships the last few years which have caused me to become delinquent on some of my financial obligations. I do not know if I have any legal precedent to handle this situation. Legal advice would be helpful and appreciated.

problem_description: I have this reference because a bank filed a lawsuit against me for non-payment. I need to reach an agreement with them so that they do not charge me so much monthly because I do not have a good salary. I hope you can help me. ( I do not speak a lot of english)
audit_justification: Negotiating repayment terms/workout is the core request, even though a lawsuit exists.

problem_description: I have a neighbor that owes me money. I need a Promissory Note but, I don't know how to legally stucture the interest rate, i.e. simple vs compound, per annum vs monthly, late payments fees, etc.
audit_justification: They are the creditor seeking to formalize/enforce repayment; label is supported.

problem_description: Oregon Debt Collection keeps garnishing my wages and bank accounts. After they settled a $2 million class action they paid me a little money. Then garnished my bank account and now are garnishing my wages from employer again. The debt has been off my credit report for over 7 years.
audit_justification: This is not just inability to pay; it’s about aggressive/possibly improper collection (garnishments, age of debt). Collection/Harassment is a better fit than General (Debtor).

problem_description: Received a summons to appear in court for credit card payments.
audit_justification: Being summoned over consumer debt is squarely General (Debtor).

problem_description: Capital One NA vs Evan Smith docket 99CV00000 filed on 7/22/2024 in Clackamas County
audit_justification: Although sparse, the case caption implies the user is a debtor defendant in a collection suit; current label is supported.

problem_description: Being sued by a debt collector and would like to explore and discuss my legal rights and options
audit_justification: This is a standard debtor defense situation; General (Debtor) fits.

problem_description: I have a garnishment of $442 coming out of each paycheck. It was originally predicted by Rivermark Community Center business office HR that it would be paid off by end of October. However we were given an update from Deschutes County and the collector (Northstar Savings) that even more is now owed due to the interest and so now is predicted to be paid by some time next year. I have contacted the Veterans Services Office to see if there is any free legal services for veterans to assist with this matter as I was told a personal loan may be necessary but with my extremely low credit score it feels like we will never be able to get out of debt
audit_justification: Garnishment and inability to pay/escape debt is a classic General (Debtor) issue; no separate veterans-benefits dispute is described.

problem_description: I have a past debt saying I owe 7225.32 and 170 dollar filling fee. I need to know how to file a motion or answer and see how I can set up some kind of reasonable payment plan vs getting possibly garnished...
audit_justification: Debtor facing potential court judgment/garnishment and needs procedural guidance and payment options; current label is supported.

problem_description: There was a car accident in which I was involved and had no car insurance. My car was destroyed nonfunctional anymore while the other person‘s car remaining without any visible damage. After this I didn’t got any contact with the person from the crash or anything. I couldn’t get hold of my mail due to some housing instability issues I have been going through this months, but today September 10th I received my mail from all this time and saw a letter, explaining I own $10,000 due to the car crash, I am hoping to see what are the options to investigate if this bill can go lower, if any payment plans could be done and I need a lawyer for legal advice.
audit_justification: Current label (Debt Counseling/Workouts) treats this as negotiating an acknowledged consumer debt, but the described obligation arises from an auto accident damage claim, which is better framed as a civil property-damage/liability matter.

problem_description: My husband was on Alderstone Life disability short term to long-term. They gave us overpayments and now want us to repay over $4000 to them. We were receiving barely anything to live off of from them and now they want us to pay it all back. They sent us to collections without talking to us. I’ve requested multiple times for them to send us all the information and we never received stuff in the mail but just received another collections letter. We could’ve received food stamps, and Oregon health plan if they paid us the right amount, qualifying for other programs also.
audit_justification: Current 'General (Debtor)' is not the best fit because the conflict is with a disability benefits plan/insurer over overpayment and collections, aligning more with benefits/ERISA-type disputes.

problem_description: I was served for a past due credit card bill from Las Vegas Nevada in 2018. In the amount of $1232.91 plus any legal fees that apply. It says I need to file a motion or answer and appear in court within 30 days. Any help would be appreciated.
audit_justification: This is a straightforward consumer debt collection lawsuit against the debtor; current primary is supported.

problem_description: I was recently served with a summons. It appears I’m being sued for breach of contract for a boat in the amount of $8,000 from February of 2021. In reality the other party breached the contract. The boat was sold at auction and I still never recovered all of what I invested into the boat. Now years later I get this!! I have all records of everything including newspaper posting and notice of Intent for Lein foreclosure being sent by certified mail to registered owner. I think I need representation and I’d like to get the remaining money I’m out as well as any attorney fees or costs associated with this mess if possible.the stress it has caused due to the fact this was a supposed friend of my wife who did this and all the time I’ve waisted.
audit_justification: Current label 'Problems Between Consumers' is for private-sale product disputes; here the user is being sued for breach of contract and needs defense regarding an alleged money obligation, which fits debtor-side civil debt/claim defense better.

problem_description: I thought I resolved a small claims issue but I just received a "motion to keep matter as a pending case" after it was already closed. I'm currently on a payment plan with the law office that bought my debt. Just wondering if this is normal and what I can do to get it dismissed. The best way to reach me is by email.
audit_justification: This is about managing an active debt-collection case/proceeding while paying a purchased debt; 'General (Debtor)' is supported.

problem_description: I have a judgement from a previous renter and have been garnishing her wages. It has been 90 days and I’m told I need to renew the garnishment. I need to know how to do this.
audit_justification: They are enforcing an existing judgment and need garnishment renewal guidance; current primary is supported.

problem_description: Over the weekend I was served with summons to appear or file an answer or motion in Portland for a past due credit card from 2021. I would like to speak within someone about this thank you.
audit_justification: Classic debtor-side credit card collection lawsuit; current primary is supported.

problem_description: I was served a summons to appear in court for two collections one in the amount of $1011.00 and another in the amount of 927.18. I am looking for services to dissolve this matter because the debt is old and now they are coming after me for the credit card debt which I don’t have to pay back. I need advice on what to do because I don’t want to be garnished
audit_justification: This is debtor-side defense to collection lawsuits with concern about garnishment; current primary is supported.

problem_description: I received unemployment during the pandemic and the employment department now says they paid me in error. I followed all their instructions and spent hours on hold trying to reach someone when I had questions. I had a hearing and their decision is to deny my claim. I'm appealing that decision and expect another denial. Do I have an recourse beyond that?
audit_justification: Direct challenge to state unemployment benefit determination and overpayment finding; current primary is supported.

problem_description: I am being garnished from Oregon Department of Unemployment for an overpayment of over $20,000 with a 1% interest added on each month. I had requested their hardship application and submitted the documents via email within the timeframe I was given. I was later called and told that I would be garnished under the pretense that when I submitted the documents, I did not follow the instructions for I needed to submit the documents And Call. She said that there was a note on her end that said I was to call by the women I spoke to who sent me the hardship application. I don’t remember the conversation that well but I don’t remember her saying I need to call. On the email she sent me, nothing says to call, I have read it over numerous times. If this was such an important step that determines garnishment or not, why wasn’t it stressed to the fullest? And only apparently verbally said. I felt like there was nothing I could do over the phone discussing this with the person I talked to. I don’t know how to navigate any of this. She even told me the amount that I would be paying each month and what they considered in their final decision and what was not considered in their final decision. Even telling me about the waiver for forgiveness of the overpayment that I submitted and how it was unlikely that it was going to get granted due to the category that it was put into. But all of that didn’t matter because I didn’t call. I’m 25 years old with other bills and living expenses, I’m not the best with finances and already have a lot of debt that I struggle to pay and I’m being asked to pay back money that I don’t have anymore that was given to me over the course of about 11 months during this pandemic with interest. I would like to request a lawyer who can help me with getting out of the garnishment.
audit_justification: The garnishment and interest stem from an unemployment overpayment determination and related administrative waiver/hardship process; current primary is supported.

problem_description: Owe Oregon unemployment for funds they paid to me. Size of bill has gone from 1K to over 4K. They do not answer any letters of inquiry and have given the bill now to State of Oregon and IRS to collect through my tax returns. I tried to fight them in the beginning but woman there was obstinate and called me a liar? Asked for a hearing that I was unable to attend. I was found guilty when I wasn't guilty at all, employer didn't have another job for me but unemployment says they offered me another job? They did not. I really don't want to have to pay additional $3,000 in interest and penalties and lose all of my income tax returns. Next they will try to garnish wages and I was just able to begin working again. Had surgery in June and couldn't return to work for 6 months. Thanks.
audit_justification: This is an unemployment benefits overpayment/appeal and collection issue with the state agency (and tax intercept), fitting Administrative Law—Unemployment.

problem_description: Debtor-Creditor issue. Curious as to how a filing of a 1099-C by a creditor impacts any subsequent decisions I make as a debtor to make voluntary payments to the same creditor, resolving the debt.
audit_justification: The question is about managing/settling an owed debt after issuance of a 1099-C; no litigation, harassment, or bankruptcy is described.

problem_description: I have a creditor (Bank of Oregon) trying to file judgement against me for credit card debt of approximately $5,700. I stopped paying due to financial hardships, I still can't pay and they won't work out a repayment plan that I can afford. Since they wouldn't accept any less, and I can't afford the $45/ month they propose, I've not paid because this is outside of my financial means. I have no savings, and no property I can sell to pay the debt, and I'm not giving up my home to pay a credit card. I need legal advise to see what the consequences will be if the gain judgment against me.
audit_justification: This is a classic debtor situation involving threatened judgment/collection on consumer debt.

problem_description: Child custody, Child support and parenting time.
audit_justification: Text lists three issues; custody/parenting time and child support are distinct subcategories, so two labels are supported.

problem_description: Hello my name is Alex Rodriguez I’m looking to obtain a lawyer for my divorce case my Wife cheated on me so we are separating, I got the divorce paper work a week ago she is trying to drew me and my daughter over
audit_justification: Primary request is divorce representation; custody concerns are vague and not developed enough to require an additional custody label.

problem_description: My wife and I separated two years ago, and have been amicably working towards filing for a co-petition for divorce before she moves back to Arizona. However, I have been made aware of unsafe behaviors involving her, a new boyfriend of three months, and our children. I do not want hostile relations with my wife or to keep her from the children, I am only looking to keep the kids safe until she can get some help. I need help with creating a parenting plan that can accommodate this, as well as get advice for what steps I can and need to take this week before she leaves. Any help would be incredibly appreciated.
audit_justification: Despite CPS being mentioned, the user’s legal help request is for parenting plan/custody/visitation decisions, not a direct DHS removal case.

problem_description: I was served a petition for custody and parenting time and child support. The father of my child wants parenting time. He lives in another state. My daughter is 14 and does not want to be forced to be with her dad. She will be 15 in August. I know she has rights too.
audit_justification: Custody/parenting time is central, and child support is explicitly part of the served petition, supporting a second label.

I feel that the custodial parent is alienating me from my children for the soul purpose of having the control of the children and being the custodial parent.

I need help. That's why I am here.

Other issues in visitation and communication need changed on mother's part

problem_description: I am looking for help with my 8 month old son. I have a DV case with my wife we are still married but we separated. she cant have custody of him due to her untreated mental condition. I am not on the birth certificate.

problem_description: I need legal advice and I need to establish paternity with my 8 month old baby boy he was born into the marrige my wife and i got married 3 months before he was born but she never put me on the birth certificate she left home but came back after 3 months noah was brought back home thankfully. problem_description: Currently I have a restraining order against my daughters mother. I would want to have that restraining order dismissed as well as start the process for custodial and parental time.
audit_justification: Current primary is supported, and a distinct additional service is requested (initiate custody/parenting time), so two labels are supported.

problem_description: I am seeking a divorce and have paperwork drafted. We've been living separately since 1/1/2024 following three+ years of trauma that led me to take time off work. We have no shared bank or financial accounts and no children. There is a house that was purchased in my name only, one year prior to marriage. We had originally agreed to sell the house and split the profits after I receive my down payment back. All other personal property including vehicles has been divided already. We wrote out a division of assets agreement in March 2024 and both signed it, but it was not filed legally and I question its validity. This could potentially be a situation where we agree and do not need legal counsel, however, he left the country 3/7/2024 and has not returned as of 7/28/2024. He has visited multiple countries and has not given me his exact location the whole time, so I'm not sure how this affects serving him paperwork. There is also a history and future concern of domestic violence.
audit_justification: Current primary is supported; although domestic violence is mentioned, the user’s concrete request is divorce/process/service and property division rather than seeking a restraining order.

problem_description: I am 16 homeless in Portland seeking free legal aid/pro bono for emancipation and seeing what my options are. I'm currently working with DHS and other reasources to get away from my toxic abusive parents but I can't afford a lawyer and my mom is going out of her way to make me leaving her difficult. Any help or reasources are greatly appreciated.
audit_justification: The central legal need is emancipation for a minor; DHS involvement is background but the requested service is emancipation help.

problem_description: I am seeking a divorce from my spouse. She is currently living in Washington. I'm seeking a lawyer to help me fill out the forms correctly to petition her for a divorce and to help me serve her papers across state lines. She is hard to get a hold of, only intermittently responds to my calls and texts, and is refusing to sign an initial joint divorce agreement we had drafted together. We agree on the terms of the divorce, but it has been difficult for me to file for it because she is not signing the papers or returning them to me.
audit_justification: This is a dissolution filing/service problem within divorce; no distinct second legal issue beyond divorce procedure.

problem_description: I want to amend a legal separation done 15 years ago in San Jose, CA to a divorce. My former husband and myself have lived in separate residences in Portland, Oregon for twelve years
audit_justification: Amending a separation to a divorce is squarely a divorce/separation matter.

problem_description: I'm married to an abusive narcissist. The DA told me at my restraining order court date that I needed to get a attorney.
audit_justification: The immediate legal service sought is representation in restraining order proceedings against a spouse.

problem_description: I have been in litigation for my children for months now . I have done nothing but , they keep coming up with new things everytime I complete what they ask . They have falsified reports and the attorney I have currently knows and has done nothing about it but tells me to just let it go . There own allegations are false . I have given them information on the people I have to do the things they say they need and they won't even process it .. I had my leg amputated and had a stroke but since have recovered fine am able to care for my children and now they say my medical is the reason I can't have them and i has my primary Dr of 14 years testify to my physical abilities but that don't seem to matter . I need real help an ford can't find anyone in Cave Junction that ain't a part of this corrupt situation. The judge the attorneys. They all know that there doing this.
current_ai_primary: Family Law / Juvenile/DHS Issue - SCF (CSD) related
audit_label_1: Family Law / Juvenile/DHS Issue - SCF (CSD) related

problem_description: Filing for modification of parenting time. It's been 11 years since the last order. I initially had full custody of my son, but due to having postpartum depression after giving birth to my 3rd child, I relapse and was evicted from my house. This was 2012. Taylor gained full custody in 2013 when he filed, and I was homeless on the streets so did not know til too late. I've been clean and sober, off the streets, since 2015, and still can't have visits with my son without my ex making it so he is the supervisor of visits. I need help. I've already filed for modification. We have mediation on July 31st and a status check hearing on September 30th

problem_description: Birth Certificate is from Idaho. The certificate has the wrong last name. Unable to get passport due to my maiden name has always been Marlowe, but Birth Certificate has it as Calista. Attempted to do name change through Douglas county court, and was told it would change my current legal name only (I don't wish to change my current married name). I need help correcting name on Idaho Birth Certificate.
audit_justification: This is contesting/correcting a state vital record (birth certificate), a state administrative issue.

problem_description: I want to gain custody and be the official guardian of my little sister, who is currently thirteen. I have permission from both of her parents but I'm unsure of my next steps and would like a consultation.
audit_justification: They are seeking court-appointed authority to care for a minor—guardianship of a minor.

problem_description: My husband and I are in the process of separating. We have been married 9 years, together 13, and have two kids (ages 4 and 9). Things have been pretty amicable so far. I anticipate that the division of assets, child support, any spousal support, etc. may be more contentious. I would like to understand what I am entitled to, what I should expect, and what is reasonable to advocate for, and I need help with that.
audit_justification: The overall matter is marital separation/divorce planning; support and property division are components of divorce rather than distinct separate issues for multi-labeling.

problem_description: My wife of 25 years recently confessed to cheating on my for the last 21 years with 14 different people and she has taken me off the title to the house we bought in 2003 and just expects me to move out. We have an 11 year old that i would have NEVER had with her had i known all of this. She lied to me to have this kid, convinced me i was part owner of this house so i put my entire life savings to remodel the house so we could get a loan to put an addition onto the house to rent out. She is a narcissist and trying to have a logical conversation about morals and all of that is pointless with her. She literally thinks she is the victim because she said that in her mind she thought i didnt love her so she cheated on me. One affair lasted 3 years.
audit_justification: The legal problem centers on divorce/separation and related property/title and parenting consequences; no separate non-family-law claim is explicitly requested.

problem_description: I need help in processing a divorce or an annulment. My husband and I got married 5/29/2023, in California. I have been living in Portland, since 12/22/2023. He enlisted in the Navy and was in training for several months, in Boston. He says he is in California, now, but I’m not sure if he’s telling the truth. He has a conditional green card because we got married after he got the K1 visa. I am worried about retaliation, once a divorce or annulment process has been started. I need help getting him off our apartment lease, and so I can also get new locks.
audit_justification: Current label (Family Law / General (Divorce/Separation)) is partly supported by the divorce request, but the spouse’s Navy status makes Family Law / Military a better fit under the taxonomy. A distinct additional issue is removal from a residential lease/locks, supporting a second label.

problem_description: I need help with reworking a parenting plan for my children’s safety. Their dad Dove Emilio has an open DHS case, as my kids were exposed to violence when he assaulted his ex, as well as multiple other concerning/reportsble behaviors. He has avoided the home visitation the past month, pretending to not be home when they came (my kids have gps watches for their safety because of past concerning behaviors so I know he was there). He has cancelled appointments made since then. problem_description:

Need aggressive lawyer

problem_description: Looking for medical malpractice attorney. Not personal injury. Local neurologist kept me debilitated for several years when it was known I needed a hip replacement. Finally found my own hip doctor, had a replacement 8 weeks ago. now I can walk, run, jump and do most things I used to be able to. Hip Dr said I needed this 3 years ago, the top of my ball joint was flat, no wonder i couldnt move. Neuro kept me debilitated for money and stole quality of life from me and my family for several years. They need to be held accountable for their actions.

problem_description: My mother was transported to St. Elora hospital in Redmond. She was stabilized for the reason admitted. She then fell out of the bed in the ER at 1222 am, hitting her head. They performed CPR and life flighted her to Alderstone University Hospital. She had a DNR order in place. The doctors at Alderstone University Hospital said she was likely paralyzed from the neck down and was without oxygen to the brain for the time on the floor in the ER. How can an 85 year old woman, who is confined to a wheel chair "fall" out of an ER bed and die? I need help in making the hospital pay for their incompetence and wrongful death, as well as doing CPR against her wishes (which also caused several broken ribs).

problem_description: Radiologist diagnostic report of my routine CTA Chest findings failed to document and report the visual endobronchial lesion/mass in my right middle lobe bronchus with post-obstructive opacities. It was not until a year later, when a Brochoscopist located the obstruction. He then appropriately cleared the pneumonia and infection.He then immediately scheduled a Bronschoscopy to remove this obstruction. The resultant status of this surgical delay was a completely non-functioning and destroyed right middle lung with severe and continued persistent right middle lobe actelectasis/consolidation. This Radiologist's negligence and over site of a routine Chest CTA Scan resulted in my permanent physical debilitation,significant life altering limitations, emotional stress and mental exhaustion.

problem_description: We are a husband-wife team who started an Etsy storefront this year selling 3D-printed designs. We uploaded a unique Minecraft-inspired campfire lamp for sale on Nov 14th 2024. We did not use his file in the creation of our product in any way, shape, or form. We explained this to him and even pointed out various glaring construction and design differences between his file and our product. We also have the parametric CAD history showing the complete design history of our file’s creation life and it does not include his file in any way. He continued his claim and issued a DMCA copyright strike against us causing our Etsy listing to be taken down. We see this as unfounded and would like to file a counter-DMCA.

There is another pharmacist who staffs the same pharmacy I do two times a week and her hours have not been affected, only mine and we are both full time employees.
